issues.description: PowerBoost with amount:0 is meaningless. The effect should dynamically set base power to opponent's Leader power, not boost by 0. This requires a custom action or different structure to represent 'becomes equal to opponent Leader power'.

Condition uses TurnCount with max:2, but the card text says 'If you have 2 or less Life cards' — this is a Life condition, not a turn count. Should use a HasLife or LifeCount condition checking your current Life ≤ 2.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[When Attacking] This Character's base power becomes the same as your opponent's Leader during this turn.
[On K.O.] If you have 2 or less Life cards, play up to 1 yellow Character card with 6000 power or less from your hand.

actions.note: DSL limitation: amount:0 is placeholder. Intent is base power = opponent Leader power. Requires custom implementation.
